Datatable column details: {"dt_bi": ["No", "Year", "Enter By", "Transaction Date", "Reference No", "PTJ", "Authority Approval", "Type", "Amount", "Status", "Approved By", "Approved Date", "Duration", "bmm_budget_movement_id", "Action"], "dt_bm": ["No", "Tahun", "Diisi Oleh", "Tarikh ", "No Referen", "PTJ", "Authority Approval", "Jenis", "Amaun", "Status", "Diluluskan Oleh", "Tarikh Lulus", "Tempoh", "bmm_budget_movement_id", "Tindakan"], "dt_js": ["return row.index", "", "", "return moment(row.createddate).format('DD/MM/YYYY')", "", "", "", "", "return toCurrency(row.bmm_total_amt)", "", "", "return row.date === 'not approve yet' ? row.date : (row.date ? moment(row.date).format('DD/MM/YYYY') : '')", "", "", "disEdit = '' disDelete = '' disCancel = '' if(row.bmm_status != 'DRAFT') disEdit = 'disabled' if(row.bmm_status != 'DRAFT') disDelete = 'disabled' if(row.bmm_status != 'APPROVE') disCancel = 'disabled' return ''+ ''+ ''+ ``+ ''+ ''+ ''"], "dt_key": ["", "bmm_year", "createdby", "createddate", "bmm_budget_movement_no", "oun_code", "bmm_endorse_doc", "bmm_movement_type", "bmm_total_amt", "bmm_status", "updatedby", "date", "duration", "bmm_budget_movement_id", ""], "dt_ajax": "api/API_BUDGET_VIREMENT_V2?BudgetVirementV2_dt=1", "dt_post": null, "dt_sort": ["unsortable", "default", "default", "default", "default", "default", "default", "default", "default", "default", "default", "default", "default", "desc", "unsortable"], "dt_bInfo": "true", "dt_class": ["", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "text-right", "", "", "", "", "d-none", "action-column"], "dt_print": "false", "dt_filter": "smart", "dt_bRefresh": "false", "dt_bPaginate": "true", "dt_saveState": "false", "dt_pageLength": "10", "dt_aLengthMenu": "5,10,25,50,100", "dt_freeze_left": "0", "dt_freeze_right": "0", "dt_bLengthChange": "true"}
Business Logic (BL) Details:
<?php

include('userinfo.php');

if($_GET['BudgetVirementV2_dt']){

	//============================================================ common filter
	//================================================utk unitPurchasing punya case, gedik
    $unitBayaran = executeQueryV2([
        "sql" => "SELECT COUNT(*) C FROM FLC_USER_GROUP_MAPPING where GROUP_ID IN ( 14, 23, 286, 339) AND USER_ID = ?",
        "params" => [$_USER['USERID']]
    ])[0]['C'];
    $staff_id = $unitBayaran>0?null:$_USER['STAFF_ID'];

    $adminpower = $_USER['USERID']==1 || $unitBayaran>0 ?
					"((bmm.createdby IN (SELECT stf_ad_username FROM ".DB2.".staff s, ".DB2.".staff_service ss WHERE s.stf_staff_id = ss.stf_staff_id AND sts_oun_code IN (SELECT sss.sts_oun_code FROM ".DB2.".staff_service sss WHERE sss.stf_staff_id = ?)) OR wtk_staff_id = ? OR sb.oun_code IN (SELECT sss.sts_oun_code FROM ".DB2.".staff_service sss WHERE sss.stf_staff_id = ?) OR 1 = 1)) AND":
					"(bmm.createdby IN (SELECT stf_ad_username FROM ".DB2.".staff s, ".DB2.".staff_service ss WHERE s.stf_staff_id = ss.stf_staff_id AND sts_oun_code IN (SELECT sss.sts_oun_code FROM ".DB2.".staff_service sss WHERE sss.stf_staff_id = ?)) OR wtk_staff_id = ? OR sb.oun_code IN (SELECT sss.sts_oun_code FROM ".DB2.".staff_service sss WHERE sss.stf_staff_id = ?)) AND ";

	$param = [
        $_USER['STAFF_ID'],
		$staff_id,
		$_USER['STAFF_ID'],
		$_USER['STAFF_ID'],
		$_POST['search']['value']
    ];
	
	$common = "
	    FROM ".DB2.".budget_movement_detl bmd, ".DB2.".structure_budget sb, ".DB2.".budget_movement_master bmm
		LEFT JOIN (
			SELECT DISTINCT 
				wtk_application_id, 
				wtk_workflow_code, 
				wtk_status, 
				wtk_staff_id 
			FROM ".DB2.".wf_task wtt
			WHERE
				wtt.wtk_workflow_code = 'BUDGET_VIRE' 
				AND wtt.wtk_status = 'NEW' 
				AND wtt.wtk_staff_id = ?
		) wt ON wt.wtk_application_id = bmm.bmm_budget_movement_no
		LEFT JOIN  ".DB2.".wf_application_status was ON bmm.bmm_budget_movement_no=was.was_application_id AND was_workflow_code in ('BUDGET_VIRE','BUDGET_VIRE_PTJ') AND was_status not like 'ENTRY'
	    WHERE
	        bmm_trans_type = 'VIREMENT' and
			sbg_budget_id_from IS NOT NULL AND
	 		bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id = bmd.bmm_budget_movement_id AND
	 		bmd.sbg_budget_id_from = sb.sbg_budget_id AND
			$adminpower
	        CONCAT_WS('__',
	        	bmm_budget_movement_no,
	        	bmm_year,
				sb.oun_code,
				bmm.qbu_quarter_id,
				format(bmm_total_amt, 2),
				date_format(bmm.createddate, '%d/%m/%Y'),
				bmm_total_amt,
				bmm_status,
				bmm_reason,
				bmm_movement_type,
				bmm_endorse_doc,
				#ifnull(bmm.updateddate,bmm.createddate),
				ifnull(was.createddate,''),
				bmm.createdby,
				bmm.updatedby
			) LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')

			-- this is for smart filter (the modal)
					AND bmm_movement_type LIKE CONCAT('%', '".$_POST['smartFilter']['bmm_movement_type']."', '%')
			
			-- this is for smart filter (the modal)
				AND bmm_status LIKE CONCAT('%', '".$_POST['smartFilter']['bmm_status']."', '%')
			
			-- this is for smart filter (the modal)
				AND bmm_year LIKE CONCAT('%', '".$_POST['smartFilter']['bmm_year']."', '%')
	";
	
	//============================================================ record count
	$sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) C 
			FROM (
				SELECT DISTINCT 
					bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id,
					bmm_budget_movement_no,
					bmm_year,
					sb.oun_code,
					bmm.qbu_quarter_id,
					format(bmm_total_amt, 2) bmm_total_amt,
					bmm.createddate createddate,
					bmm_status,
					bmm_reason,
					bmm_movement_type,
					bmm_endorse_doc,
					#ifnull(bmm.updateddate,bmm.createddate) date,
					ifnull(was.createddate,'') date,
					bmm.createdby createdby,
					bmm.updatedby updatedby,
					concat(datediff(was.createddate,bmm.createddate), if(datediff(was.createddate,bmm.createddate)>1,' Days',' Day')) duration 
				$common) tbl
	";
	$recordsFiltered = executeQueryV2($sql, $param)[0]['C'];
	
	//============================================================ main sql
	$sql = "SELECT DISTINCT
				bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id,
				bmm_budget_movement_no,
				bmm_year,
				sb.oun_code,
				bmm.qbu_quarter_id,
				format(bmm_total_amt, 2) bmm_total_amt,
				bmm.createddate createddate,
				bmm_status,
				bmm_reason,
				bmm_movement_type,
				bmm_endorse_doc,
				#ifnull(bmm.updateddate,bmm.createddate) date,
				ifnull(was.createddate,'') date,
				bmm.createdby createdby,
				bmm.updatedby updatedby,
				concat(datediff(was.createddate,bmm.createddate), if(datediff(was.createddate,bmm.createddate)>1,' Days',' Day')) duration
			$common
			ORDER BY RIGHT(bmm_budget_movement_no,4) desc, LEFT(bmm_budget_movement_no,8) desc
			LIMIT ".$_POST['start'].", ".$_POST['length']."
	";
	$data = executeQueryV2($sql, $param);
	
	for($a=0; $a<count($data);$a++){
		$data[$a]['urlEdit'] = 'index.php?a='.flc_url_encode('page=page_wrapper&menuID=1559&mode=edit&currStatus='.$data[$a]['bmm_status'].'&bmm_budget_movement_id='.$data[$a]['bmm_budget_movement_id']);
		$data[$a]['urlView'] = 'index.php?a='.flc_url_encode('page=page_wrapper&menuID=1559&mode=view&currStatus='.$data[$a]['bmm_status'].'&bmm_budget_movement_id='.$data[$a]['bmm_budget_movement_id']);
	}
	
	//============================================================ finally
	return [
	    'draw' => $_POST['draw'],
	    'recordsFiltered' => $recordsFiltered,
	    'data' => $data
	];
				
}

if($_GET['Checking']){

	// checking virement dah cancel atau belum
	$checkstatus = executeQueryV2("SELECT bmm_status FROM ".DB2.".budget_movement_master WHERE bmm_budget_movement_id = ?", [$_GET['bmm_budget_movement_id']])[0]['bmm_status'];

	if($checkstatus == 'CANCEL'){
		return [ "status" => "ko", "errorMsg" => "This virement already cancelled."];
	}
	else{ return [ "status" => "ok"];}
}

if($_GET['cancelProcess']){

	$sqlSource = "
		select 
			sbg_budget_id_from, 
			bmd.qbu_quarter_id, 
			now() currdate, 
			bmm_budget_movement_no, 
			bmd_mvt_amt,
			bmd_bgt_movement_detl_id,
			bmm_year
		from 
			".DB2.".budget_movement_detl bmd, 
			".DB2.".budget_movement_master bmm
		where 
			bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id = bmd.bmm_budget_movement_id and
			sbg_budget_id_from is not null and
			bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id = ?
	";
	
	$rsSource = executeQueryV2($sqlSource, [$_GET['bmm_budget_movement_id']]);
	
	for($s=0; $s<count($rsSource); $s++){
		// nak dptkan bmd_bgt_movement_detl_id utk sp update_budget tambah 250223
		$sql_budgetcode = "SELECT lbc_budget_code FROM ".DB2.".structure_budget WHERE sbg_budget_id = ?";
		$rs_budgetcode = executeQueryV2($sql_budgetcode, [$rsSource[$s]['sbg_budget_id_from']])[0]['lbc_budget_code'];
		executeQueryV2("CALL ".DB2.".update_budget('{$rsSource[$s]['sbg_budget_id_from']}', '{$rsSource[$s]['qbu_quarter_id']}', '{$rsSource[$s]['currdate']}', '{$rsSource[$s]['bmm_year']}', '{$rsSource[$s]['bmm_budget_movement_no']}',  NULL, 'INCREASE', '{$rs_budgetcode}', '{$rsSource[$s]['bmd_mvt_amt']}', '1559', '06', @p_msg, 'VIREMENT', '{$rsSource[$s]['bmd_bgt_movement_detl_id']}', null, null, ?)", [$_USER['USERNAME']]);
		$rsMessage = executeQueryV2("SELECT @p_msg as MESSAGE")[0]['MESSAGE'];
	}
	
	$sqlTarget = "
		select 
			sbg_budget_id_to, 
			bmd.qbu_quarter_id, 
			now() currdate, 
			bmm_budget_movement_no, 
			bmd_mvt_amt,
			bmd_bgt_movement_detl_id,
			bmm_year
		from 
			".DB2.".budget_movement_detl bmd, 
			".DB2.".budget_movement_master bmm
		where 
			bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id = bmd.bmm_budget_movement_id and
			sbg_budget_id_to is not null and
			bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id = ?
	";
	
	$rsTarget = executeQueryV2($sqlTarget, [$_GET['bmm_budget_movement_id']]);

	for($t=0; $t<count($rsTarget); $t++){
		// nak dptkan bmd_bgt_movement_detl_id utk sp update_budget tambah 250223
		$sql_budgetcode = "SELECT lbc_budget_code FROM ".DB2.".structure_budget WHERE sbg_budget_id = ?";
		$rs_budgetcode = executeQueryV2($sql_budgetcode, [$rsTarget[$t]['sbg_budget_id_to']])[0]['lbc_budget_code'];
		executeQueryV2("CALL ".DB2.".update_budget('{$rsTarget[$t]['sbg_budget_id_to']}', '{$rsTarget[$t]['qbu_quarter_id']}', '{$rsTarget[$t]['currdate']}', '{$rsTarget[$t]['bmm_year']}', '{$rsTarget[$t]['bmm_budget_movement_no']}',  NULL, 'DECREASE', '{$rs_budgetcode}', '-".$rsTarget[$t]['bmd_mvt_amt']."', '1559', '06', @p_msg, 'VIREMENT', '{$rsTarget[$t]['bmd_bgt_movement_detl_id']}', null, null, ?)", [$_USER['USERNAME']]);
		$rsMessage = executeQueryV2("SELECT @p_msg as MESSAGE")[0]['MESSAGE'];
	}
	
	$rsUpdateMaster = executeQueryV2("update ".DB2.".budget_movement_master set bmm_status = 'CANCEL', bmm_cancel_remark = ? where bmm_budget_movement_id = ?", [$_POST['bmm_cancel_remark'], $_GET['bmm_budget_movement_id']]);
	
	$rsUpdateDetail = executeQueryV2("update ".DB2.".budget_movement_detl set bmd_mvt_status = 'CANCEL' where bmm_budget_movement_id = ?", [$_GET['bmm_budget_movement_id']]);

	$getDataAcknowledge = executeQueryV2([
		"sql" => "
			SELECT 
				bmm_budget_movement_no,
				bmm_total_amt,
				bmm_money_transfer
			FROM ".DB2.".budget_movement_master
			WHERE bmm_budget_movement_id = ?
		",
		"params" => [$_GET['bmm_budget_movement_id']]
	])[0];

	$bmm_money_transfer = $getDataAcknowledge['bmm_money_transfer'];

	$acknowledgeContent = 'The virement has been cancelled. Reference No:'.$getDataAcknowledge['bmm_budget_movement_no'].' Thank You.';

	if($bmm_money_transfer=='Y'){
		executeQueryV2([
			"sql" => "
				INSERT INTO ".DB2.".wf_task (wtk_process_id, wtk_workflow_code, wtk_application_id, wtk_task_name, wtk_task_url, wtk_staff_id, wtk_status, createdby, wtk_sequence, wtk_extended_field) 
				SELECT
					( SELECT max(wfp_process_id) FROM ".DB2.".wf_process WHERE wfp_workflow_code = 'ACK_APP_REJECT' AND wfp_sequence = 1),
					'ACK_APP_REJECT',
					'".$getDataAcknowledge['bmm_budget_movement_no']."',
					CONCAT(' The virement has been cancelled. Reference NO:', '".$getDataAcknowledge['bmm_budget_movement_no']."', ' Thank You.') newTitle,
					' Http:// ' taskURL,
					stf.stf_staff_id,
					'NEW',
					username,
					2,
					JSON_OBJECT(' staffEmail', ifnull(stf_email_addr, ''), ' wtk_staff_name', ifnull(stf_staff_name, ''), ' autoAcknowledge', 0, ' acknowledgeMessage', ' I acknowledge the receive of the information.')
				FROM
					".DB2.".staff stf,
					fims.FLC_USER_GROUP b,
					fims.FLC_USER_GROUP_MAPPING c,
					fims.PRUSER d
				WHERE
					b.GROUP_ID = c.GROUP_ID
					AND c.USER_ID = d.USERID
					AND d.USERNAME = stf.stf_ad_username
					AND b.GROUP_CODE = 'UNIT_IMPREST_CLERK'
			"
		]);
	}
	
	if($rsUpdateMaster && $rsUpdateDetail){
		return [
			"status" => "ok"
		];
	}else{
		return [
			"status" => "ko"
		];
	}
}

if($_GET['deleteItem']){
	$rsDeleteDetail = executeQueryV2("delete from ".DB2.".budget_movement_detl where bmm_budget_movement_id = ?", [$_GET['bmm_budget_movement_id']]);
	
	$rsDeleteMaster = executeQueryV2("delete from ".DB2.".budget_movement_master where bmm_budget_movement_id = ?", [$_GET['bmm_budget_movement_id']]);
	
	if($rsDeleteDetail && $rsDeleteDetail){
		return [
			"status" => "ok"
		];
	}else{
		return [
			"status" => "ko"
		];

}

// Continue by Nad on 130323
if($_GET['download']){

	$param[] = $_USER['STAFF_ID'];

	//================================================utk unitPurchasing punya case, gedik
    $unitBayaran = executeQueryV2([
        "sql" => "SELECT COUNT(*) C FROM FLC_USER_GROUP_MAPPING where GROUP_ID IN ( 14, 23, 286, 339) AND USER_ID = ?",
        "params" => [$_USER['USERID']]
    ])[0]['C'];
    $staff_id = $unitBayaran>0?null:$_USER['STAFF_ID'];

	$adminpower = $_USER['USERID']==1 || $unitBayaran>0 ?
					" AND ((bmm.createdby IN (SELECT stf_ad_username FROM ".DB2.".staff s, ".DB2.".staff_service ss WHERE s.stf_staff_id = ss.stf_staff_id AND sts_oun_code IN (SELECT sss.sts_oun_code FROM ".DB2.".staff_service sss WHERE sss.stf_staff_id = ?)) OR wtk_staff_id = ? OR sb.oun_code IN (SELECT sss.sts_oun_code FROM ".DB2.".staff_service sss WHERE sss.stf_staff_id = ?)) OR 1 = 1)":
					" AND (bmm.createdby IN (SELECT stf_ad_username FROM ".DB2.".staff s, ".DB2.".staff_service ss WHERE s.stf_staff_id = ss.stf_staff_id AND sts_oun_code IN (SELECT sss.sts_oun_code FROM ".DB2.".staff_service sss WHERE sss.stf_staff_id = ?)) OR wtk_staff_id = ? OR sb.oun_code IN (SELECT sss.sts_oun_code FROM ".DB2.".staff_service sss WHERE sss.stf_staff_id = ?)) ";

	$param = [
        $_USER['STAFF_ID'],
		$staff_id,
		$_USER['STAFF_ID'],
		$_USER['STAFF_ID']
    ];

	if($_POST['search']){
		$smartfilter = " AND CONCAT_WS('__',
						bmm_budget_movement_no,
						bmm_year,
						sb.oun_code,
						bmm.qbu_quarter_id,
						format(bmm_total_amt, 2),
						date_format(bmm.createddate, '%d/%m/%Y'),
						bmm_total_amt,
						bmm_status,
						bmm_reason,
						bmm_movement_type,
						bmm_endorse_doc,
						ifnull(bmm.updateddate,bmm.createddate)
					) LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')
		";
		$param[] = $_POST['search'];
	}

	if($_POST["sm_filter"]['bmm_year']){
		$smartfilter .= " AND bmm_year LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')";
		$param[] = $_POST["sm_filter"]['bmm_year'];
	}

	if($_POST["sm_filter"]['bmm_status']){
		$smartfilter .= " AND bmm_status LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')";
		$param[] = $_POST["sm_filter"]['bmm_status'];
	}

	if($_POST["sm_filter"]['bmm_movement_type']){
		$smartfilter .= " AND bmm_movement_type LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')";
		$param[] = $_POST["sm_filter"]['bmm_movement_type'];
	}

	$common = " FROM ".DB2.".budget_movement_detl bmd, ".DB2.".structure_budget sb, ".DB2.".budget_movement_master bmm
				LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT wtk_application_id, wtk_workflow_code, wtk_status, wtk_staff_id FROM ".DB2.".wf_task) wt ON wt.wtk_application_id = bmm.bmm_budget_movement_no 
				AND wt.wtk_workflow_code = 'BUDGET_VIRE' AND wt.wtk_status = 'NEW' AND wtk_staff_id = ?
				WHERE
					bmm_trans_type = 'VIREMENT'
					AND sbg_budget_id_from IS NOT NULL
					AND bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id = bmd.bmm_budget_movement_id
					AND bmd.sbg_budget_id_from = sb.sbg_budget_id
					$adminpower
					$smartfilter
	";

	$column = $_POST['sort']['column'];
	$column = $column+1;

	//============================================================ CSV & PDF
	if($_GET['download']=='CSV'){

		$desc = (PROJECT_TYPE == 'maips') ? '`Description`' : '`Authority Approval`';

		$sql = "SELECT
					1 Indexing,
					bmm_year `Year`,
					date_format(bmm.createddate, '%d/%m/%Y') `Transaction Date`,
					CONCAT('=\"',bmm_budget_movement_no,'\"') `Reference No`,
					sb.oun_code `PTJ`,
					bmm_endorse_doc $desc,
					bmm_movement_type `Type`,
					format(bmm_total_amt, 2) `Amount`,
					bmm_status `Status`,
					date_format(ifnull(bmm.updateddate,bmm.createddate), '%d/%m/%Y') `Date`,
					bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id
				$common
				ORDER BY RIGHT(bmm_budget_movement_no,4) desc, LEFT(bmm_budget_movement_no,8) desc
		";
		$data = executeQueryV2($sql, $param);

		foreach($data as &$d) {
			unset($d['Indexing'],$d['bmm_budget_movement_id']);
		}
		
		//============================================================ finally
		generateCSV([
			"filename" => "List of Budget Virement", 
			"header" => [
				[' ',' ','List of Budget Virement'],
				['Tarikh:', '' ,date("Y/m/d")],
				['Search ', ':', $_POST['search']['value']],
			],
			"index" => true,
			"content" => $data,
		]);
	}
	elseif($_GET['download']=='PDF'){

		$desc = (PROJECT_TYPE == 'maips') ? '`Description`' : '`Authority Approval`';

		$sql = "SELECT
					1 `FORMAT_CENTER::Indexing`,
					bmm_year `FORMAT_CENTER::Year`,
					date_format(bmm.createddate, '%d/%m/%Y') `FORMAT_CENTER::Transaction Date`,
					bmm_budget_movement_no `FORMAT_CENTER::Reference No`,
					sb.oun_code `PTJ`,
					bmm_endorse_doc $desc,
					bmm_movement_type `FORMAT_CENTER::Type`,
					format(bmm_total_amt, 2) `FORMAT_RIGHT::Amount`,
					bmm_status `FORMAT_CENTER::Status`,
					DATE_FORMAT(ifnull(bmm.updateddate,bmm.createddate),'%d/%m/%Y') `FORMAT_CENTER::Date`,
					bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id
				$common
				ORDER BY RIGHT(bmm_budget_movement_no,4) desc, LEFT(bmm_budget_movement_no,8) desc
		";

		$data = executeQueryV2(["sql" => $sql, 
			"params" => $param
		]);

		foreach($data as &$d) {
			unset($d['bmm_budget_movement_id']);
		}

		$topmargin = (PROJECT_TYPE == 'maips') ? 42 : 35;
		generatePDF([
			"filename" => "List of Budget Virement",
			"DATA" => $data,
			"columnwidth" => [7,8,9,10,7,20,10,10,10,9],
			"orientation" => 'landscape',
			"fontsize" => 8,
			"topmargin" => $topmargin,
		]);
	}
}

Form_Item_lookup_query:
SELECT distinct bmm_movement_type flc_id, bmm_movement_type flc_name 
FROM fims_usr.budget_movement_master where bmm_trans_type = 'VIREMENT' AND bmm_movement_type != '';

SELECT distinct bmm_status flc_id, bmm_status flc_name FROM fims_usr.budget_movement_master where bmm_trans_type = 'VIREMENT'
ORDER BY bmm_status ASC ;
